description: Perform a URL hygiene and structure audit for https://crawler-test.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Analyze the site for issues including excessive length (>115 characters), uppercase characters, underscores, and non-ASCII characters. Export the URI data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/uri_analysis.csv. Generate a remediation report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/url_hygiene_report.txt that includes the total URL count, the count of URLs exceeding 115 characters, the count of URLs containing uppercase characters or underscores, a list of the 10 longest URLs found, and specific remediation recommendations.
